top_signals.title: Ethena taps Anchorage for secure offchain collateral in institutional lending push
top_signals.summary: Ethena began pivoting toward overcollateralized institutional lending in April as part of a major overhaul of USDe reserves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: EU deploys largest ever wildfire response for 2026 summer
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 02 Jun 2026 With wildfire risks rising across Europe, the European Commission is helping finance and coordinate the deployment of a record number of firefighters, aircraft and emergency experts under the Civil Protection Mechanism.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
